# vendor/flowlog-examples

Verbatim copy of `flowlog/examples/*.dl` from the upstream Rust
FlowLog repo (the source the TS port was lifted from). Lives here so
the parsing / planning / catalog / optimizing / executing test suites
can broadly cover real programs without depending on a sibling git
checkout being present.

If the upstream gets new programs, re-copy them here. Don't edit the
files — every difference from upstream should be filed there, not
papered over locally.
